title: athyrium caespitosum
intro: Athyrium caespitosum, also known as the bushy lady fern, is a species of fern in the genus Athyrium and family Woodsiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Athyrium caespitosum are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Athyrium caespitosum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
